headline: Taco Bell tries to lure fans back with $1 Enchiritos
summary: The fast-food Mexican chain has been in the spotlight throughout the weeks-long cyclospora outbreak.

headline: Yum Brands (YUM) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Yum (YUM) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Yum! Brands Q2 Preview: All Eyes On The Taco Outlook
summary: Ahead of the Q2 release, Yum! Brands shares have come under pressure following news that Taco Bell was linked to the Cyclospora outbreak. For more on YUM stock.
